bead.title: Probe Qwen3.6-27B + populate catalog + fix surface-id lookup + revert benchmark profiles
bead.description:
Operator-driven integration bead. Depends on schema (fizeau-1567453f),
introspection (fizeau-e80c156e), translator (fizeau-144bd2f9), probe-tool
(fizeau-d72b32a0), and token-extraction (fizeau-8f62bcbb) beads all
landing. Runs the probe against all four lanes, populates the catalog
with any L2 values still required (mainly OR-Qwen3), fixes the surface-id
lookup mismatch, updates the ds4 catalog entry, and reverts benchmark
profiles to portable named-tier intent.

Per ADR-010 Amendment 2026-05-11, lanes with rich introspection (ds4 via
/props, llama-server via /props) get their wire form auto-derived at
construction time — catalog L2 values are unnecessary for them. L2 is
only needed where introspection is thin: OR-Qwen3.

Steps (must land as a single commit set — partial state regresses runs):

1. **Run the probe** against each of:
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/fiz-openrouter-qwen3-6-27b.yaml
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/sindri-club-3090-llamacpp.yaml
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/vidar-ds4.yaml
   Save snapshots + verification matrix artifacts under
   docs/research/probe-reasoning-2026-05-11/<lane>/.

2. **Catalog updates** in internal/modelcatalog/catalog/models.yaml:
   - `qwen3.6-27b` entry: set `reasoning_wire: tokens` (L2 value, used
     when the provider is OR — introspection adapters cover the local
     Qwen3 lanes). Today the entry has `reasoning_wire: model_id`
     which is wrong per ADR-010 §Latent-bug-and-the-fix; replace.
   - `deepseek-v4-flash` entry (CREATE if missing): catalog ID
     `deepseek-v4-flash`, surfaces.agent.openai = `deepseek-v4-flash`,
     `reasoning_levels: [high, max]` (only practically-distinct levels
     per ds4 alias map), `reasoning_control: tunable`, `reasoning_wire:
     effort`. ProtocolCapabilities at internal/provider/ds4/ds4.go
     already switches to ThinkingFormat = OpenAIEffort via the
     translator bead; introspection at construction is the primary
     source.
   - Other Qwen variants (qwen3.5-27b etc.): out of scope; file
     follow-ups if probing shows divergence.

3. **Fix surface-id lookup** at internal/config/config.go:925-944
   modelReasoningWireMap():
   - Today keys by catalog ID. Provider queries by surface ID. They
     mismatch for any model where catalog ID != surface ID (e.g.
     `qwen3.6-27b` vs `qwen/qwen3.6-27b`).
   - Refactor to return map[surfaceSystem]map[surfaceID]string
     (e.g. {\"agent.openai\": {\"qwen/qwen3.6-27b\": \"tokens\"}}).
   - Update construction sites that consume it:
     internal/provider/openai/registration.go:29,
     internal/provider/openrouter/openrouter.go:34.
   - Add a test that the lookup resolves via surface ID, not catalog
     ID, for Qwen3.6 on OR.

4. **Revert all four Qwen + ds4 benchmark profiles** from
   `reasoning: 4096` to portable named intent. The default after the
   amendment work lands:
   - reasoning: `low` for cost-bounded sweeps (PortableBudgets=2048).
   - reasoning: `medium` (PortableBudgets=8192) for full-quality runs.
   Inline comments in each profile reference ADR-010 and note any
   lane-specific limits (ds4: only `high` and `max` are distinct;
   sindri: budget is a soft hint, max_tokens caps actual). Files:
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/fiz-openrouter-qwen3-6-27b.yaml
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/sindri-club-3090-llamacpp.yaml
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/vidar-ds4.yaml
   - scripts/benchmark/profiles/vidar-qwen3-6-27b.yaml (legacy oMLX;
     update if still in use, else delete or mark archived)

5. **Single-cell verification sweep** on each lane against a short TB-2.1
   task. report.json must carry:
   - reasoning_tokens > 0 (populated either directly or via the
     reasoning_content fallback from fizeau-8f62bcbb)
   - reasoning_tokens_approx accurately flagging the source
   - reasoning_intent and reasoning_emitted fields if the translator
     bead added the capability-honesty pass-through

In-scope files:
- internal/modelcatalog/catalog/models.yaml
- internal/config/config.go
- internal/config/config_test.go
- internal/provider/openai/registration.go
- internal/provider/openrouter/openrouter.go
- scripts/benchmark/profiles/fiz-openrouter-qwen3-6-27b.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/profiles/sindri-club-3090-llamacpp.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/profiles/vidar-ds4.yaml
- scripts/benchmark/profiles/vidar-qwen3-6-27b.yaml
- docs/research/probe-reasoning-2026-05-11/ (probe artifacts)

Out-of-scope:
- Other Qwen variants in catalog.
- Non-Qwen OR-hosted models (GPT-5, Claude) — wire=\"provider\"
  backwards-compat path serves them correctly today.
- vLLM lane rehabilitation.
bead.acceptance:
1. Probe artifacts exist under docs/research/probe-reasoning-qwen3-6-27b-
   2026-05-11/ with one subdirectory per lane, each containing per-matrix-
   point request and response bodies plus a verdict summary.
2. internal/modelcatalog/catalog/models.yaml qwen3.6-27b entry has
   reasoning_wire set to a value driven by the probe (expected `tokens` but
   probe is the authority).
3. `go test ./internal/config/...` passes including a new test that
   modelReasoningWireMap resolves wire form by surface ID for
   `qwen/qwen3.6-27b` on `agent.openai`, returning the catalog value
   (not "").
4. All four benchmark profiles list `reasoning: low` (or whichever named tier
   the operator picks based on the probe) and have updated comments
   referencing ADR-010.
5. A targeted single-cell test sweep on each lane (use any short
   TerminalBench-2.1 task — e.g. `hello-world` or similar) produces a
   report.json with reasoning_tokens populated and the value within the
   probe-verified band:
   - OR-Qwen + reasoning=low + wire=tokens: reasoning_tokens ~= 2048 ± 30%.
   - sindri-llamacpp + reasoning=low: reasoning_tokens ~= 2048 ± 30%
     (assuming the chat-template template flip happened — if not, ~= 0 and
     the template-flip is a separate operator action).
   - vidar-ds4 + reasoning=low: reasoning_tokens ~= 2048 ± 30%.
6. The full epic (fizeau-92d44ce0) closes after this bead closes.

governing.title: ADR-010: Reasoning Wire Form Belongs in the Model Catalog
